_meta.purpose: Date ranges classified as WAR regime (USD-affecting geopolitical conflict). Outside any range = BAU.
_meta.classification_rule: Only conflicts that materially move USD via safe-haven flows, sanctions, oil shock, or central bank reaction. Regional flare-ups without USD impact stay BAU.
_meta.format: Each range has 'start' and 'end' in YYYY-MM-DD (inclusive). 'open_ended' = true means the end date is provisional and the conflict is still ongoing; treat as WAR up to today.
_meta.source: Curated by hand from widely-reported events. NOT auto-generated. Review and edit before each new backtest period if your run window touches a range boundary.

war_ranges.label: Russia-Ukraine full-scale invasion
war_ranges.usd_impact: Safe-haven USD bid; energy shock via EUR; sustained sanctions cycle.
war_ranges.notes: Invasion confirmed 2022-02-24. Pre-invasion troop massing and recognition of Donetsk/Luhansk on 2022-02-21 already moved DXY; start one week early.

war_ranges.label: Israel-Hamas war (post Oct 7)
war_ranges.usd_impact: Initial safe-haven USD bid; oil risk premium; spillover into JPY and CHF.
war_ranges.notes: Begins on Oct 7 2023 attack. Includes the spillovers below as embedded sub-events but the regime tag does not lift.

war_ranges.label: Iran-Israel direct strikes (Apr 2024)
war_ranges.usd_impact: Sharp safe-haven USD spike; oil futures; intraday FX vol on USDCHF and USDJPY.
war_ranges.notes: Iran direct missile/drone strike on Israel 2024-04-13; Israeli response 2024-04-19. Tail of two weeks captures DXY mean-reversion. Embedded inside the Israel-Hamas range above so this entry is redundant in classification but kept for audit.

war_ranges.label: Iran-Israel direct strikes (Oct 2024)
war_ranges.usd_impact: Safe-haven USD bid; oil; risk-off in equities / NAS100.
war_ranges.notes: Iran ballistic-missile attack on Israel 2024-10-01. Two-week tail captures volatility decay. Embedded inside Israel-Hamas range above.
